content.body: krosylight (they/them): any reason https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/blob/master/notifications/icon-url-encoding-euc-kr.tentative.https.html is tentative? This also applies to `navigate`.
content.formatted_body: krosylight (they/them): any reason https://github.com/web-platform-tests/wpt/blob/master/notifications/icon-url-encoding-euc-kr.tentative.https.html is tentative? This also applies to navigate.

content.body: Cookie Store and some other APIs too. I really need to flip the default behavior of the UTF-8 argument in WebKit.

I think mostly because https://github.com/whatwg/notifications/issues/209 is still open and only gecko passes the test https://wpt.fyi/results/notifications/icon-url-encoding-euc-kr.tentative.https.html?label=experimental&label=master&aligned
should do something for fetch steeps in notifications...

krosylight (they/them): I see. I think it would be fine to make it non-tentative as it matches the specification. tentative is really for when the specification would say to use the document encoding or some such.
content.formatted_body: krosylight (they/them): I see. I think it would be fine to make it non-tentative as it matches the specification. tentative is really for when the specification would say to use the document encoding or some such.
